message:
fix(storage): work around fsqlite UNIQUE constraint and EXISTS limitations

- Replace INSERT OR REPLACE with DELETE+INSERT in set_config,
  set_metadata, set_metadata_in_tx, set_export_hash, set_export_hashes,
  upsert_issue_for_import, and dirty_issues marking (fsqlite does not
  enforce UNIQUE constraints on non-rowid columns)
- Add explicit duplicate check in create_issue
- Convert correlated EXISTS subqueries to IN subqueries in
  list_issues, get_dirty_issues, and get_ready_issues label filters
  (fsqlite eagerly evaluates EXISTS and strips bind parameters)
- Use BEGIN IMMEDIATE instead of BEGIN CONCURRENT in mutate()

Fixes 6 additional test failures (21 total fixed from original 61).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
